name: launch
description: Desktop project launcher — start, stop and monitor dev projects from a native macOS app
author: Gijsbert

scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --names server,vite,electron --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 tcp:4000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
